calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-02-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner, Mary Teresa Lawrence was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Mary Teresa Bravewoman. Decree signed in open court.
